engineering_practice.rule: In automatic mode, rings/diaphragms are placed at shell-course joints. Joints too close to heads are skipped. Strength calculation may require additional rings.

standards.title: ГОСТ 17032. Резервуары стальные горизонтальные для нефтепродуктов. Технические условия
standards.role: Base product standard for horizontal steel tanks; refers strength calculations to vessel strength standards.
calculator_use: link from RGS type selection and normative report

standards.title: ГОСТ 34233.1. Сосуды и аппараты. Нормы и методы расчёта на прочность. Общие требования
standards.role: General strength calculation requirements, design loads and allowable stresses.

standards.title: ГОСТ 34233.2. Цилиндрические и конические обечайки, выпуклые и плоские днища и крышки
standards.role: Modern strength calculation line for cylindrical shells, conical parts, flat heads and stiffening elements.
calculator_use: stiffening ring section and spacing checks

standards.title: ГОСТ 14249. Сосуды и аппараты. Нормы и методы расчёта на прочность
standards.role: Legacy/reference calculation basis for shells under internal and external pressure.
calculator_use: external pressure stability check between stiffeners

standards.title: СП 20.13330. Нагрузки и воздействия
standards.role: General load combinations and environmental load basis.

standards.title: СП 14.13330. Строительство в сейсмических районах
standards.role: Seismic site data and future seismic checks.

standards.title: СП 22.13330. Основания зданий и сооружений
standards.role: Soil properties, underground installation, groundwater and foundation interaction.

implementation_notes: Current code checks shell external pressure capacity between rings and uses 1490 mm shell-course layout as the automatic minimum.
The API returns calculation_cases and protocol arrays so the UI can show formula, inputs, result, allowable value, margin and standard reference.
Ring section verification now explicitly requires profile geometry for moment of inertia; area-only input is treated as incomplete data.
